title: jasminum odorum
intro: Jasminum odoratum is a species of jasmine plant, also known as the white jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, which is native to tropical Asia and is highly valued for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's flowers and leaves have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, indigestion, and skin conditions, due to their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jasminum odoratum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to promote relaxation and well-being.
